name: Cater Diamond
description:
Don't you notice how I get quiet when there's no one else around?

Me and you and awkward silence

Don't you dare look at me that way

I don't need reminders of how you don't feel the same

Mutual crush! I need something that’s not angst for this man🫩

Anyways I got bored and tmmr is my bday so this is my present to myself!!

First time making a bot pls don’t slime me

Edit: updated the personality so hopefully he doesn’t sound as ooc anymore
creator: _erm_actually_
